scenario.task: Test the appointment cancel and reschedule flow. Start by saying 'I need to cancel my appointment APT-BRANCH-0001'. The agent should: (1) transfer to advisory_appointment_agent, (2) retrieve the appointment details using the access token, (3) ask for confirmation before cancelling, (4) call the cancel appointment tool. Then ask 'Actually, can I reschedule it instead?' to test the reschedule path. Verify the agent handles lifecycle operations correctly, asks for confirmation on destructive actions, and provides clear status updates.

scenarioExpectations.expectedResult: The agent routes to advisory_appointment_agent for appointment management.
The agent asks for confirmation before cancelling or rescheduling.
The agent communicates the outcome of the lifecycle action clearly.
